name: Emergency Operations Post — Sergeant Duplessis
description: The forward operations post is a converted school bus at the edge of the dry road corridor north of the Industrial Canal, its radio equipment running off a generator that has been cycling on and off since this morning; Sergeant Duplessis manages the sector triage log from a folding table outside.
atmosphericDetails: The generator provides intermittent power; the radio is functional on VHF Channel 22A and Channel 16 but the operator has been logging traffic from four sectors simultaneously
The triage log is a ruled composition notebook with entries in three different handwriting styles — the shift changes are visible in the ink color

A reconnaissance airframe is scheduled to pass over the Lower Ninth Ward sector within the next forty minutes; its coordinates will be logged against whatever the operations post has on record for active survivor locations
The road surface here is dry — the first dry road surface within a mile of the canal; the contrast with the flooded grid to the south is absolute
